comment: Quality Gates catalog -- orphan-scripts waivers. SIMPLIFY-12 (P63) audits scripts/ at milestone close. Each row documents a script that survives P63 (after caller-scan in P63 Wave 2) as a thin shim because canonical removal would break documented dev-loop UX or external doc references. Pure deletions land in Wave 2 with no row here. Schema: id=orphan-scripts/<basename>, kind=mechanical, verifier=quality/gates/structure/orphan-scripts-audit.py (Wave 2 ships it). Wave 2 populates rows[] based on the actual caller-scan results.
